steps.title: Test the point
steps.content:
Substitute the coordinates $x=4$ and $y=-18$ into the inequality.
$$y\leq 4x-18$$

steps.title: Check the inequality
steps.content:
Evaluate the right side.
$$4(4)-18=16-18=-2$$
Then compare.
$$-18\leq -2$$
This is true, so the point is a solution. The answer is C.
